listening.title: Listening: A shopping trip
listening.transcript: I bought some fruit and a new bag. I thought it was a little expensive, but I bought it anyway. I told my sister about it.

questions.question: What did the speaker think about the bag?
questions.explanation: "I thought it was a little expensive".

listening.title: Listening: A museum visit
listening.transcript: They built this museum about a hundred years ago. I found some old photographs inside. The exhibition began last month.
